description_long: This is a round, bulbous bottle with a wide, red body and a narrow, white neck topped with a brown cork stopper. The bottle's body is smooth and features a single, subtle horizontal band in a muted gold or olive color encircling its widest part. The neck is slender and slightly flares out at the top, providing a clear transition to the cork closure. The cork appears to be made of natural material and fits snugly into the neck, suggesting the bottle is designed to securely contain its contents. The overall shape is reminiscent of a decorative or potion bottle, with a stable, flat base for upright placement. There are no visible labels, logos, or text on the exterior, and the surface appears clean and undamaged.
description: A round, red bottle with a narrow white neck and a brown cork stopper, featuring a subtle gold band around its widest part. The surface is smooth and unmarked, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full round red body, white neck, brown cork, and the gold band clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, with the gold band and bottle shape consistent, cork and neck visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front and side, with the gold band and bottle contours unchanged.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the same features: red body, gold band, white neck, and brown cork.
